titleStmt.title: SII 23.593: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 593. (A.R. No. 593 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah district Saumyanātha temple—In the same place Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāndya. Year 10

summary.p: This registers a transaction similar and in addition to the one recorded in No. 591 above. The same donor Piḷḷai Pallavarāyar is said to have given 200 paṇam to Śrīvaishṇavadāsar Ulagamuṇḍāṉ and to Dāsaṉ Kēśavapperumāḷpiḷḷai Śokkaṉ on behalf of the temple, for the formation of a flower garden called Rāmānujaṉ-tirunandavanam and these latter shared 400 kuḻi of tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam between them for cultivating the land and enjoying the yield as muṟṟūṭṭu after supplying flower garlands to the temple out of flower plants grown all round the hedges. Another condition was that the different fruit trees, plantains and vegetables (kīḷpachchai?) belonged to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉacakravattika
ḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10-10 vatānavyaya
samvaasarattu Ā(ṭ)ṭimātattoru nāḷ nirantaṉūrān
Akarabrahmadeyam śrīkulottuṅka coḻac caturvedimaṅkala
ttu mahāsabhaiyum kulottuṅka coḻa viṇṇaka remperumā
ṉ cokkapperumāḷkoyilśrīvaiṣṇavavāriya mulakamuṇṭān
dāsaru mivaṉaivom śilāśāsanam paṇṇinapaṭi Ic cokkappe
rumāḷukku rāmānujan tirunandavanam ceyvatāka piḷḷai pallava
rāyar śrīvaiṣṇavadāsaruṭaiyavum dāsaṉ kecavap perumāḷ piḷḷai cokka
ṉuḷḷiṭṭāruṭaiyavum kaiyil tirunandavanaśeṣamāka piḷḷai kuṭuttuvara viṭṭa
ruḷina paṇam Irunūṟum paṇṭāraśeṣamāka kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṇam
Irunūṟṟil palicaikkuc cilavāka tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattile Ūṟku
meṟku meṭumpaḷḷamāka kuḻi Irunūṟṟampatum viḻuntāṅkiṭaipa
ṭṭaiyil kuḻi nūṟṟaimpatumāka nilam kuḻi nāṉūṟum Ikko
yil śrīvaiṣṇavadāsar pātiyum Ic cokka nuḷḷiṭṭār pātiyumāka payiṟ
ceytu muṟṟūṭṭu manupavikka kaṭavarkaḷākavum tirunaṉtavanam veli Ilāta
paṭi tiruppūmaraṅkaḷ niṟaintaṉa Ākki tirumālaikaḷum Eṭuttu tevai
paṭātapaṭi ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ittirunaṉtavanattil palapṛ
kṣaṅkaḷum vāḻaiyum kiḻpaccaiyum Uḷḷutu śrīpaṇṭāraceṣamā
kak kaṭavatākavum piḷḷai pallavarāyaruṭaya Iddharmam candrādityavarai cel
lakkaṭavatāka śilāśāsanam paṇṇiṉo mivaṉaivom dāsanima
n=tam Iraṇṭukku piḷḷai tiruvuḷḷamāna kuḻi Aññūṟṟukku muṉpu kal
veṭṭina kuḻi ṉānūṟum piṉpu viḻuntāṉ taṭakkaiyil muṉpu viṭ
ṭa nilattup puṉcey kiḻakkaṭaiya viṭṭa kuḻi nūṟum Āka kuḻi Añ
ñūṟu ñūṟu kuḻiyil Uṟpattiye
ṭukka vum kuṭikkuṟṟapaṭiy ve
rāka kuṭuttu cevvittu potuka .
Digital edition of SII 23.593 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
